# fabric_workspace_git_outbound_policy (Data Source)

The Workspace Git Outbound Policy data-source allows you to retrieve details about a Fabric [Workspace Git Outbound Policy](https://learn.microsoft.com/fabric/security/workspace-outbound-access-protection-overview).

-> This data-source supports Service Principal authentication.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fabric_workspace_git_outbound_policy" "example" {
  workspace_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_id` (String) The Workspace ID.

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `default_action` (String) Default policy for workspace access from public networks. Value must be one of : `Allow`, `Deny`.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>

### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
